name: get-note
title: GetNote
description: Search, save, and manage GetNote notes with Raycast AI
author: fangbaiyu

preferences.name: manualApiKey
preferences.title: Manual API Key
preferences.description: Optional. Use a GetNote API key directly instead of the stored local session.

preferences.name: manualClientId
preferences.title: Manual Client ID
preferences.description: Optional. Defaults to the pre-registered GetNote client ID if omitted.

commands.name: save-link
commands.title: Save Link
commands.subtitle: GetNote
commands.description: Save a link note to GetNote

commands.name: save-text-note
commands.title: Save Text Note
commands.subtitle: GetNote
commands.description: Save a text note to GetNote

commands.name: save-image-note
commands.title: Save Image Note
commands.subtitle: GetNote
commands.description: Save local image files or image URLs to GetNote

tools.name: get-total-note-count
tools.title: Count GetNote Notes
tools.description: Return only the total number of notes in the user's GetNote account. Use for questions about how many notes exist. Do not use for API quota, API usage, rate limits, remaining allowance, or knowledge-base-specific counts.

tools.name: get-quota
tools.title: Check GetNote API Quota
tools.description: Return current GetNote OpenAPI quota, usage, remaining allowance, rate limits, and daily/monthly reset times for read, write, and write-note buckets. Use whenever the user asks to view, check, or query quota, API usage limits, remaining calls, or whether they can keep calling the API. Do not use for counting notes or listing knowledge bases.

tools.name: search-notes
tools.title: Search GetNote Notes
tools.description: Search the user's notes with semantic recall. Use when the user wants to find notes by topic, concept, keyword, or remembered fragment. Do not use for total counts, API quota, creating notes, deleting notes, or knowledge-base-only search when a topicId is provided.

query.description: The query or semantic description to search for in GetNote.

topK.description: How many results to return. Default 5, maximum 10.

tools.name: get-note-detail
tools.title: Get GetNote Note Detail
tools.description: Fetch the full detail of one specific GetNote note by note ID, including content, tags, metadata, attachments, audio/web-page fields, and source URL. Use only when a concrete noteId is known or was returned by another tool. Do not use for search, note counts, quota, or listing recent notes.

tools.name: save-link-note
tools.title: Save Link to GetNote
tools.description: Create a new GetNote link note from a public URL, wait for async processing, and return the generated note. Use when the user asks to save, collect, bookmark, or record a URL. Do not use for plain text notes, quota, search, or modifying existing notes.

url.description: The public URL to save into GetNote.

tools.name: save-text-note
tools.title: Save Text Note to GetNote
tools.description: Create a new plain-text GetNote note. Use for quick capture, memos, ideas, chat answers, or saving text without a URL. Do not use for link notes, quota, search, deleting notes, or updating an existing note.

tags.description: Optional tags to add to the note.

tools.name: list-knowledge-bases
tools.title: List GetNote Knowledge Bases
tools.description: List the user's own GetNote knowledge bases/topics with topic IDs and per-knowledge-base note counts. Use only when the user explicitly asks about knowledge bases, topics, topicId, or the count/list of knowledge bases. This is not an API quota tool. Do not use for quota, API usage limits, remaining calls, total account note count, semantic note search, or subscribed read-only knowledge bases.

tools.name: create-knowledge-base
tools.title: Create GetNote Knowledge Base
tools.description: Create a new GetNote knowledge base/topic. Use only when the user explicitly asks to create a knowledge base/topic. Do not use for listing, searching, note counts, quota, or adding notes to an existing knowledge base.

name.description: The name of the new knowledge base.

description.description: Optional description of the knowledge base.

cover.description: Optional cover URL of the knowledge base.

tools.name: list-knowledge-base-notes
tools.title: List GetNote Knowledge Base Notes
tools.description: List notes inside one specific GetNote knowledge base by topicId. Use when the user provides or has selected a topicId and asks to see/list notes in that knowledge base. Do not use for global note search, global note count, API quota, or listing all knowledge bases.

tools.name: search-knowledge-base-notes
tools.title: Search GetNote Knowledge Base Notes
tools.description: Run semantic search within one specific GetNote knowledge base by topicId. Use when the user asks to search/find content inside a named or selected knowledge base/topic. Do not use for global search, total counts, API quota, or listing notes without a search query.

query.description: The semantic query to search for within the knowledge base.

topK.description: How many results to return. Default 5, maximum 10.

tools.name: add-note-to-knowledge-base
tools.title: Add Note to GetNote Knowledge Base
tools.description: Add one or more existing GetNote notes to one of the user's own writable knowledge bases. Use only when the user explicitly asks to add/move/classify notes into a knowledge base and noteIds plus a topicId are known or can be resolved. Do not use for creating notes, creating knowledge bases, quota, search, or tag changes.

noteIds.description: One or more GetNote note IDs to add.

tools.name: add-tags
tools.title: Add Tags to GetNote Note
tools.description: Add manual tags to one specific GetNote note by noteId. Use when the user explicitly asks to tag or add tags for a known note. This adds tags and does not replace all tags. Do not use for knowledge-base classification, note counts, quota, search, or deleting tags.

tags.description: Tags to add to the note.

tools.name: delete-tag
tools.title: Delete GetNote Note Tag
tools.description: Delete one specific tag from one GetNote note by noteId and tagId. Use only when the user explicitly asks to remove/delete a tag. Use get-note-detail first if the tag ID is unknown. Do not use for deleting notes, quota, search, or removing notes from a knowledge base.

tools.name: delete-note
tools.title: Delete GetNote Note
tools.description: Move one specific GetNote note to trash by noteId. Use only when the user explicitly asks to delete/remove/trash a note. Do not use for deleting tags, removing notes from a knowledge base, quota, counts, or search.

noteId.description: The GetNote note ID to move to trash.

ai.instructions: Route requests about OpenAPI quota, usage limits, remaining calls, credits, allowance, rate limits, or current API usage to get-quota. Route requests about the total number of notes in the account to get-total-note-count. Route requests about knowledge bases/topics only to list-knowledge-bases when the user explicitly mentions knowledge bases, topics, or topicId. Quota is about API call allowance, not note quantity and not knowledge-base data. If the user asks to view, check, or query quota without mentioning notes or knowledge bases, use get-quota.

evals.input: @get-note how many notes do I have
@get-note how much API quota do I have left
@get-note find my notes about product optimization

results.title: Payment Flow Optimization
results.content: Add a progress bar to reduce anxiety during waiting.

evals.input: @get-note save this idea: shorten onboarding to three steps
@get-note create a knowledge base called Product Research
@get-note list notes in knowledge base topic_123

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you intended to publish to npm, remove the prepublishOnly script and run npm publish again.
If you wanted to publish to the Raycast Store instead, use npm run publish.

" && exit 1
